title: QuickNoteMax
description: An in-game notepad — write coords, notes and more. Press N to open.
body:
# 📓 QuickNoteMax

Never lose your coords again. **QuickNoteMax** is an in-game notepad — press `N` and start writing. Share your notes with other players in real time.

---

## ✨ Features

- **Multi-page notepad** — up to 8 pages with tabs
- **📍 Coords button** — inserts your current X Y Z highlighted in gold
- **Saved per world** — notes are separate for each world and server
- **Global pages** — mark a page as global so it stays the same across all worlds and servers
- **Export / Import .txt** — saves to your Desktop, reimport anytime
- **Auto-backup** — notes are automatically backed up every 10 saves (last 5 kept)
- **Full text editor** — mouse selection, Home/End, Page Up/Down, word jump (Ctrl+Left/Right)
- **Keyboard shortcuts** — Ctrl+A, C, V, X, Z, Y — configurable in Options → Controls
- **Undo / Redo** — Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y, per page, up to 50 states
- **Ctrl+F search** — find text in your notes, highlighted in real time
- **Color text** — start a line with `/red `, `/green `, `/blue `, `/yellow `… to color it
- **Page rename** — double-click a tab to rename it
- **Pin pages** — pin a page to keep it at the front (gold block icon)
- **Drag tabs** — drag and drop to reorder your pages
- **Real-time sharing** — share a page with specific players on the server, they see your edits live
- **Share notification** — get a toast when someone shares a page with you
- **Adaptive GUI** — scales to your window size
- **Does not pause** the game when open

---

## 🎮 How to use

| Action | Result |
|---|---|
| Press `N` | Open QuickNote |
| `Enter` | New line |
| `📍 Coords` | Insert current coordinates (shown in gold) |
| `+ Page` / `✕ Page` | Add / delete page |
| Double-click tab | Rename page |
| Drag tab | Reorder pages |
| Gold block button | Pin / unpin page |
| Lapis block button | Toggle global page |
| `⬡ Share` | Share current page with online players |
| `⬆ Import` / `⬇ Export` | Load or save .txt on Desktop |
| `Ctrl+Z / Y` | Undo / Redo |
| `Ctrl+F` | Search in current page |
| `Ctrl+A` | Select all (configurable key) |
| `Ctrl+C / V / X` | Copy / Paste / Cut |
| Click & drag | Select text with mouse |
| `/red ` (start of line) | Color that line red |

---

## 💾 Where are notes saved?

`.minecraft/quicknote/<world_name>/notes.json`

Global pages are saved in `.minecraft/quicknote/global/notes.json`

Backups are stored in `.minecraft/quicknote/<world_name>/backups/`

Each world and server has its own separate notes file.

---

## 🌐 Multiplayer sharing

The sharing feature requires **both players to have the mod installed**. It also requires the mod to be installed on the server if you're on a dedicated server (the server doesn't need to be modded otherwise — just Fabric with the mod in the mods folder).
